task_completion.description: Open the Bayesian Independent Samples T-Test analysis in JASP
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Bayesian Independent Samples T-Test' header in the analysis control panel on the left side of the JASP interface.

task_completion.description: Assign 'extra' as the dependent variable and 'group' as the grouping variable
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'extra' listed in the 'Dependent Variables' box and 'group' listed in the 'Grouping Variable' box within the analysis panel.

task_completion.description: Configure the prior distribution to Normal with Mean = 0 and Standard Deviation = 1
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Prior' section in the analysis panel. Ensure the 'Normal' option is selected, with 'Mean' set to 0 and 'Std.' set to 1.

task_completion.description: Include sequential analysis plots and descriptive statistics
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for checked boxes for 'Sequential analysis' and 'Descriptives' in the analysis panel. Verify that the corresponding sequential analysis plot and descriptives table appear in the results pane on the right.

task_completion.description: Save the analysis to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog or the JASP title bar indicating the file is being saved as 'Sleep_Sequential_Bayes.jasp' in the '/home/ga/Documents/JASP' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the JASP GUI to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the JASP graphical interface is used to configure the test and save the file, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual JASP application
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the JASP application window is active and being interacted with, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Results appear to come from genuine software interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the results pane displays properly formatted JASP tables and plots, indicating genuine computation rather than pasted text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is exactly '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/Sleep_Sequential_Bayes.jasp'. The analysis type must be 'TTestBayesianIndependentSamples'. Required settings are priorFamily='Normal', sequentialAnalysis=true, and descriptives=true.
